response.justification: James has strong full-stack experience, deep technical breadth across languages including Python, JavaScript, and C/C++, and a proven track record in distributed systems and open-source tooling, but lacks explicit evidence of building enterprise-scale experimentation platforms, telemetry infrastructure, or AI-driven growth systems as required — his work leans toward general engineering and GIS/data platforms rather than controlled experimentation, feature flagging, or growth metrics systems.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, and C/C++ across diverse domains
Proven ability to build and ship open-source infrastructure tools with real-world adoption (e.g., GISCollective)
Strong engineering fundamentals demonstrated through TDD, CI/CD, and performance-critical system design
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or leading experimentation frameworks, feature flighting, or growth measurement systems
Limited visibility into experience with AI-driven engineering velocity tools or scalable telemetry infrastructures
Role requires 8+ years in growth/experimentation systems — his resume shows generalist engineering, not specialization
